title: clematis × poizatii
intro: Clematis × poizatii, also known as 'Blekitny Aniol' or 'Poizat's Clematis', is a hybrid clematis plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family, known for its striking blue-purple flowers and ability to thrive in cooler climates. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots are used to treat various health issues, including rheumatism, gout, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clematis × poizatii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
